name: baseline
description: Frontend default mission: 500 kg dry, 300 m/s, no margin.

engine.notes: N2H4/NTO variant — uses hydrazine as fuel, not MMH.

engine.heritage: Mars Express, Venus Express, Rosetta, ExoMars TGO

engine.notes: Rhenium/iridium chamber. 100 lbf class, highest-performance MMH/MON apogee engine available. Source: L3Harris 2025 datasheet.
N2H4/MON variant (not MMH). Lower O:F ratio.
100 lbf dual-mode variant — runs on N2H4 fuel for higher Isp (328 vs 322 of MMH HiPAT). O/F: 0.85-1.00 (hydrazine-rich).
Uses LMP-103S. Higher Isp than hydrazine monoprop.
200 lbf dual-mode. +22 s Isp over MMH variant by running hydrazine-rich.
Uses LMP-103S (ADN-based). Flagged as N2H4 for tank compat — actually needs ADN-compatible tanks (Ti or specific alloys).

engine.heritage: GEO RCS, flown, not in production (Q/F/NIP)
engine.notes: 5 lbf class, direct-acting solenoid or torque motor valve.

engine.heritage: Eurostar, MSG, CosmoSkyMed, many LEO platforms
Ariane 5 RCS (170+ units), ARD, IXV, ExoMars
Apollo LM RCS heritage, Dragon 2 trunk, Shuttle RCS
engine.notes: 25 lbf. 2.5M-pulse life. One of the most flown biprop thrusters.

engine.heritage: OTS-2, ECS, Marecs, Telecom-1, Skynet 4 (500+ units)
Shuttle Orbital Maneuvering System RCS heritage
engine.notes: 900 lbf class. Not in production (Q/F/NIP) — flight-heritage stockpile only. Line-pressure actuated solenoid pilot valve.

engine.heritage: Aerojet AR-47 RCS, gas-operated solenoid pilot class
engine.notes: 85 lbf. HIGH feed pressure (650 psia / 44.8 bar) — requires high-pressure tankage; most catalog tanks (MEOP < 40 bar) will not qualify. Gas-operated solenoid pilot valve.

engine.heritage: Aerojet large RCS, qualified and flown
engine.notes: 1587 lbf. HIGH feed pressure (650 psia) — specialty tankage required. Gas-operated solenoid pilot valve.
